html:
Exclusive to:

“Oh, I've got big plans for this.”

–Winona

The Gizmo is a special resource that can be acquired only by Winona with the Founder's Keepers II skill. When equipping Inspectacles, Winona can find Gizmo from opening Advanced Cacheboxes, which has 25% chance to appear.

The Gizmo can only be stored in Winona's inventory and cannot be put inside any storage container. When left on the ground, it will disappear after a few seconds.

It can be used for crafting the Teletransport Station or Portasol.

{{Quote|Oh, I've got big plans for this.|Winona}}
The '''Gizmo''' is a special resource that can be acquired only by [[Winona]] with the [[Founder's Keepers II]] skill. When equipping [[Inspectacles]], Winona can find Gizmo from opening [[Advanced Cachebox]]es, which has 25% chance to appear.

The Gizmo can only be stored in Winona's inventory and cannot be put inside any storage container. When left on the ground, it will disappear after a few seconds.

It can be used for crafting the [[Teletransport Station]] or [[Portasol]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
